title: ANC - changes are present after putting the app in the background
scenario: ANC settings persist when Poly Studio Mobile app is backgrounded and then brought to the foreground
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Tap on the connected Poly device name to open Device Settings.
Set ANC to a specific mode (e.g., High ANC, Low ANC, or Adaptive).
Press the Home button or recent apps button to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
Wait a few seconds, then bring the app back to the foreground by tapping the app icon or selecting it from recent apps.
Navigate back to Audio Settings → ANC and observe the current ANC setting.
expected: The ANC setting should remain unchanged (same mode as set in step 4) after bringing the app back to the foreground.
